reasoner.analysis: Checked 720-900s emailservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+23.3 and p50 dev=+6.9 indicate severe latency spikes. Traces show latency.p99 deviations (+3.7 to +1.5). Mem dev=+1.1 to +2.4 supports resource pressure. Ranking confirms emailservice_latency as root cause.
